The [[Gallofree Yards, Inc./Legends|Gallofree Yards]] '''HTT-26 heavy troop transport''' was an atmospheric [[Transport/Legends|transport]] design. They were one of the few transports that Gallofree created for military application.

==Characteristics==
They were capable of carrying light numbers of infantry within their hold and use their heavy [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] engines to lift from one location to another, hovering above the battlefield. They were armed with a rapid fire [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] suited to taking out infantry and protecting embarking and disembarking troops.

==History==
These vehicles were used as transports by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during their [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]] with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
